speaker: Nova Wilde
text: Chicago. First real stop. The press is already sniffing around — we need to decide right now how we're playing this city. Loud and messy, or strategic and controlled.

choices.label: Loud and messy. Let the music do the talking.
Strategic. Nova's right — we need good press.
Ask Jet what he thinks.

speaker: Ryder Blaze
text: THAT's what I'm talking about. We go full volume, no apologies. This city either loves us or it doesn't — I refuse to beg for it.

choices.label: Lock it in. Full volume tonight.
Ryder, simmer down. We still need to soundcheck.

speaker: Nova Wilde
text: Smart. I already have a Chicago Tribune contact who wants an exclusive before the show. This could get us a feature.

choices.label: Do the interview. Exposure is everything.
No interviews before a show. I need to focus.

speaker: Jet
text: Honestly? I'd say keep it loose. But... look, I got a call earlier. The venue owner here — we have history. Might want to handle that before soundcheck.

choices.label: What kind of history, Jet?
Handle it yourself. We've got bigger things to worry about.

speaker: Jet
text: Look... I may have borrowed some money from the guy. Before the band. It's fine — I'm handling it. Just don't let him pull you aside alone.

choices.label: How much? I'll cover it from the band fund.
That's your problem, Jet. Don't let it hit the show.

speaker: Jet
text: ...You didn't have to do that. Seriously. I'll pay you back — every cent. You're a good one.

choices.label: We're a band. That's how it works.

speaker: Ryder Blaze
text: Soundcheck. Right. Fine. But I swear if the monitors are garbage again I'm walking on stage and just SCREAMING until they fix it.

choices.label: Fair anough. Let's go check the stage.

speaker: Nova Wilde
text: Perfect. Keep it punchy — talk about the tour, not about Ryder's mood swings. And for the love of god, don't mention the last venue we got kicked out of.

choices.label: Got it. I'll be charming.

speaker: Ryder Blaze
text: Alright. Venue's open. We got time before doors — explore if you want. But when I say it's time to go on, we GO.

choices.label: Walk the venue floor.
Head to backstage — check the setlist with the band.
Skip it. Let's just play.
Thanks for coming out.
Tell the whole bar to stay. It's going to get loud.

speaker: Nova Wilde
text: Okay. I want to open with something that hits fast. Ryder wants the slow burn opener. You're the tiebreaker.

choices.label: Hit fast. We need to grab them immediately.
Slow burn. Build tension, then destroy them.

speaker: Ryder Blaze
text: Time's up. Stage is ours. Let's go.

choices.label: Let's go.

speaker: Nova Wilde
text: Cameras are on. This is it — our first real shot. Don't blow it.

speaker: Jet
text: Well. That happened. Crowd's still buzzing — I can hear it. How are you feeling?

choices.label: Alive. I want to do that every night.
We made some mistakes. We need to fix them before Nashville.

speaker: Ryder Blaze
text: Every night? That's the only way I know how to live. Nashville's going to be different though — better stage, bigger crowd, higher stakes. You ready?

choices.label: Born ready.

speaker: Nova Wilde
text: Smart. I filmed the whole thing — I will send you notes on the parts that lost the room. Nashville is a music city. They'll eat us alive if we're sloppy.

choices.label: Send me the notes. I want to see everything.

speaker: Nova Wilde
text: Bus is loaded. Nashville's 8 hours. Something always happens on the road — it's how this life works. Try to sleep if you can.

speaker: Ryder Blaze
text: Nashville. Music city. Every person here thinks they're the next big thing. Let's remind them who they came to see.

choices.label: Let's scope the scene before soundcheck.
Straight to soundcheck. No distractions.
Friendly. Make a connection.
Cold. You're not here to make friends.

speaker: Nova Wilde
text: That was a smart move. Half of Nashville is built on who you know. Ryder's giving me death stares but long-term? Smart.

choices.label: On to the stage.

speaker: Jet
text: Monitors are actually decent here. And the stage is huge. I think we should drop the opener and hit them with the second song first.

choices.label: Do it. Shake up the order.
Stick to the setlist. We know what works.

speaker: Ryder Blaze
text: Nasville. Here we come. No holding back — not tonight, not ever.

speaker: Nova Wilde
text: That crowd was different. Louder. More demanding. And we held it. Something shifted tonight — I can feel it. Act 2 is going to look a lot different.

choices.label: Europe next. Let's go.

speaker: Jet
text: London. Berlin. I've always wanted to play Europe. Just... let's make sure the tour bus doesn't break down over the Atlantic.
